create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Text Field
create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, add an AcroForm, and place a text box field on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.title: Create PDF with Top‑Positioned Checkbox Field
create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, add an AcroForm checkbox near the top of the page, and save the document.

add-gender-radio-button-group-to-pdf.title: Add Gender Radio Button Group to PDF
add-gender-radio-button-group-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document with an AcroForm and add a radio button field for selecting gender.

add-list-box-to-pdf-acroform.title: Add List Box to PDF AcroForm
add-list-box-to-pdf-acroform.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add an AcroForm list box field, populate it with country options, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

create-acroform-text-field-with-appearan.title: Create AcroForm Text Field with Font and Color
create-acroform-text-field-with-appearan.description: The example creates a new PDF, adds a text box AcroForm field, and sets its default appearance such as font, size, and color before saving the document.

fill-text-field-in-pdf.title: Fill Text Field in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
fill-text-field-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, locate a specific form text field, set its value, and save the updated document.

set-pdf-checkbox-field.title: Set PDF Checkbox Field Using Aspose.Pdf
set-pdf-checkbox-field.description: Loads an existing PDF, finds the first checkbox form field, sets its checked state based on input data, and saves the modified document.

select-radio-button-in-pdf-form.title: Select Radio Button in PDF Form
select-radio-button-in-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating a radio button form field, setting its selected option, and saving the updated document.

select-listbox-option-in-pdf-form.title: Select ListBox Option in PDF Form
select-listbox-option-in-pdf-form.description: Loads an existing PDF, finds a ListBox form field by name, sets its selected option using a 1‑based index, and saves the modified document.

populate-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from a Dictionary
populate-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating over its form fields, and assigning values from a case‑insensitive dictionary before saving the updated document.

read-pdf-form-field-value.title: Read PDF Form Field Value
read-pdf-form-field-value.description: Loads a PDF document, finds a form field by its name, extracts the field's value, and prints it to the console.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, extract all form field values, and serialize them into a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing a form and export its form fields and values to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xml-data-into-pdf-xfa-form.title: Import XML Data into PDF XFA Form
import-xml-data-into-pdf-xfa-form.description: Shows how to load an XML file and import its data into an XFA form inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated PDF.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, export its form fields to a JSON string, and write the JSON to a file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-json-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import JSON Form Data into PDF
import-json-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, import form field values from a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf, and save the populated document.

post-pdf-form-data-xml.title: Post PDF Form Data as XML to Remote Endpoint
post-pdf-form-data-xml.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its form fields as XML, and posts the XML to a specified web service using HttpClient.

add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Form
add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF form, insert a new blank page while keeping existing form fields intact, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-new-page-with-acroform-fields.title: Add New Page with AcroForm Fields to PDF
add-new-page-with-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to insert a blank page into an existing PDF and place fresh AcroForm fields (text box, checkbox, and radio button group) on that page using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-specific-form-field-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Form Field from PDF
delete-specific-form-field-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove a named form field from an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified file.

flatten-pdf-remove-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF to Remove Form Fields
flatten-pdf-remove-form-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flattening it to remove all interactive form fields, and saving the resulting non‑interactive document.

style-pdf-form-field-border.title: Style PDF Form Field Border Color and Width
style-pdf-form-field-border.description: Shows how to change the border width and color of a specific form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

highlight-required-form-fields.title: Highlight Required Form Fields in PDF
highlight-required-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, detect required fields, set their background color to highlight them, and save the updated document.

set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.title: Set Font Size and Style for a PDF Text Box Field
set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a TextBox form field, and configures its font name, size, and color via DefaultAppearance, also applying minimum and maximum font size limits.

set-pdf-form-field-read-only.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only
set-pdf-form-field-read-only.description: Loads a PDF, retrieves a text box form field, assigns an initial value, marks the field as read‑only to prevent further editing, and saves the updated document.

mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required
mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a specific form field, set its Required property to enforce validation, and save the updated document.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-textbox-form-field.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Text Box Form Field
add-tooltip-to-pdf-textbox-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to insert a text box form field into a PDF and set its tooltip (AlternateName) to guide users on the expected input format.

set-default-value-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Default Value for a PDF TextBox Form Field
set-default-value-for-pdf-form-field.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextBox form field on the first page, assigns a default value and appearance that appear when the PDF is opened, and saves the modified document.

add-blank-page-save-modified-pdf.title: Add Blank Page and Save Modified PDF
add-blank-page-save-modified-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a blank page, and saves the modified document to a new file, preserving the original.

save-pdf-incremental-update-form-fill.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update after Form Fill
save-pdf-incremental-update-form-fill.description: The example opens an existing PDF, fills a text box form field, and saves the document using Aspose.Pdf's parameterless Save method, which writes the changes as an incremental update preserving previous revisions.

batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Batch Fill PDF Form Fields
batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, set predefined form field values in each document, and save the updated PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-apply-xml-to-pdf-forms.title: Batch Apply XML Data to PDF Forms
batch-apply-xml-to-pdf-forms.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDFs, bind each matching XML file to the PDF form fields, and save the filled PDFs to an output directory using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and export its form data to a separate XML file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-data-to-csv.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, exporting its form fields to JSON with Aspose.Pdf, parsing the JSON, and writing the field names and values to a CSV file with proper escaping.

validate-required-form-fields.title: Validate Required Form Fields Before Saving PDF
validate-required-form-fields.description: Loads a PDF, checks that all fields marked as required have values, and only saves the document if validation passes.

create-pdf-absolute-acroform-textbox.title: Create PDF with Absolutely Positioned AcroForm TextBox
create-pdf-absolute-acroform-textbox.description: Shows how to add an AcroForm text box field to a PDF using absolute coordinates, set its default appearance, and add an additional field appearance.

create-acroform-text-field-with-margins.title: Create AcroForm Text Field with Page Margins
create-acroform-text-field-with-margins.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with an AcroForm text box positioned relative to page margins and how to add a second appearance of the same field using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.title: Extract XFA Form Data from PDF to XML
extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, checks for an XFA form, extracts the XFA data package as an XML document, and saves it to a file for further processing.

import-xfa-data-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML into PDF
import-xfa-data-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load XFA data from an XML file and assign it to a PDF that contains an XFA form using Aspose.Pdf, then save the filled PDF.

merge-pdfs-unique-acroform-fields.title: Merge PDFs While Preserving Unique AcroForm Field Names
merge-pdfs-unique-acroform-fields.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF documents that contain AcroForm fields, renaming duplicate field names to keep them unique before appending pages and saving the merged result.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields After Filling
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Loads a PDF, fills a specific form field, flattens all form fields so they become part of the page content (non‑editable), and saves the resulting PDF.

restore-editable-form-fields.title: Restore Editable Form Fields from Original PDF
restore-editable-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to regain editability of form fields by loading the original (unflattened) PDF, modifying a field, and saving the result.

create-pdf-form-field-with-custom-embedd.title: Create PDF Form Field with Custom Embedded Font
create-pdf-form-field-with-custom-embedd.description: Demonstrates how to load an external TrueType font, embed it in a PDF, and apply it to a form TextBoxField's appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-form-field-label.title: Rotate Form Field Label by 45 Degrees
rotate-form-field-label.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a PDF form field label by applying a 45‑degree rotation to the field's rectangle before creating the TextBoxField using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-pdf-form-field.title: Hide PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf
hide-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a specific form field, and set its widget annotation flag to Hidden so the field is not displayed on the rendered page.

create-screen-only-form-field.title: Create Screen‑Only Form Field (Visible but Non‑Printable)
create-screen-only-form-field.description: Shows how to add a text box form field that is visible on screen but excluded from printing by clearing the Print annotation flag.

import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF Using AssignXfa
import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XFA PDF, parse XML form data from a string, and import it into the PDF using Aspose.Pdf's AssignXfa method.

export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Pretty-Printed JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, configure export options, and write all form fields to an indented JSON file for easy reading.

import-form-data-from-compressed-json.title: Import Form Data from Compressed JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-compressed-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, decompress a GZIP‑compressed JSON payload, import the form data using Form.ImportFromJson, and save the updated document.

create-multi-page-pdf-with-distinct-form.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Distinct Form Fields
create-multi-page-pdf-with-distinct-form.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing several pages and add different AcroForm fields (text boxes, check boxes, radio buttons, list boxes) to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-form-field-to-another-page.title: Copy Form Field to Another Page in PDF
copy-form-field-to-another-page.description: Shows how to duplicate an existing form field and place the copy on a different page of the same PDF, adjusting its position as needed.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Programmatically
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Loads a PDF, checks for a specific form field, renames it (including its MappingName), and saves the updated document.

clone-modify-pdf-form-field.title: Clone and Modify a PDF Form Field on Another Page
clone-modify-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to clone an existing form field, place the clone on a different PDF page, and adjust its appearance and behavior using Aspose.Pdf.

assign-javascript-onlostfocus-action.title: Assign JavaScript OnLostFocus Action to PDF Form Field
assign-javascript-onlostfocus-action.description: Shows how to load a PDF, retrieve a form field, and attach a JavaScript action that runs when the field loses focus to calculate a total value.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a push‑button on an existing PDF form and configure it to post the form data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button into an existing PDF form that clears all user‑entered data by executing JavaScript.

set-automatic-calculation-pdf-form-field.title: Set Up Automatic Calculation for PDF Form Fields
set-automatic-calculation-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, enable auto‑recalculation of form fields, assign a JavaScript calculation script to a field, and save the updated document.

add-numeric-field-range-validation.title: Add Numeric Field with Range Validation to PDF
add-numeric-field-range-validation.description: Creates a PDF form, adds a NumberField, and attaches JavaScript that validates the entered value is within a defined numeric range.

list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List PDF Form Field Names
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Loads a PDF document, checks for an AcroForm, and enumerates all form fields, printing each field's name.

filter-pdf-form-fields-by-type.title: Filter PDF Form Fields by Type Using LINQ
filter-pdf-form-fields-by-type.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all form fields, and use LINQ's OfType<T> to select only specific field types such as TextBoxField and ListBoxField.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, configure JSON export options, and export all form field definitions to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-acroform-fields-from-json.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to deserialize a JSON schema that defines AcroForm fields and add those fields to a newly created PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt.title: Fill PDF Form Fields and Encrypt with AES-256
fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt.description: The example loads a PDF, populates form fields, applies AES‑256 encryption with user/owner passwords and specific permissions, and saves the protected document.

apply-digital-signature-to-pdf-form.title: Apply Digital Signature to a PDF Form
apply-digital-signature-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with filled form fields, adding a signature field, and signing the document using a PKCS#12 certificate to certify its authenticity.

set-pdf-metadata-after-form-processing.title: Set PDF Document Metadata After Form Processing
set-pdf-metadata-after-form-processing.description: Shows how to load a PDF, optionally fill form fields, set standard and tagged metadata such as author, title, and language, and save the updated document.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, set its form field values using a dictionary, and return the updated PDF as a byte array.

async-import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Asynchronously Import XML Form Data into PDF
async-import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read XFA XML form data asynchronously, assign it to the PDF form, and save the result without blocking the main thread.

parallel-batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Parallel Batch Fill PDF Form Fields
parallel-batch-fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf to fill the same set of form fields in multiple PDF documents concurrently with Parallel.ForEach, improving batch processing performance.

log-pdf-form-field-modifications.title: Log PDF Form Field Modifications
log-pdf-form-field-modifications.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF form fields, record their original values, apply changes (e.g., update text boxes and set read‑only), and write each modification to a timestamped log file for audit purposes.

generate-csv-report-of-filled-pdf-form-f.title: Generate CSV Report of Filled PDF Form Fields
generate-csv-report-of-filled-pdf-form-f.description: The example loads multiple PDF documents, extracts their form fields with Aspose.Pdf, filters only fields that contain values, and writes a CSV summary listing the file name, field name, and field value.

compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.title: Compare PDF Form Data and Generate Diff Report
compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.description: Demonstrates how to compare the form data of two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API and produce JSON and PDF diff reports that highlight mismatched values.

create-pdf-template-with-form-placeholde.title: Create PDF Template with Form Field Placeholders
create-pdf-template-with-form-placeholde.description: Shows how to generate a PDF template containing text box, checkbox, and date fields using Aspose.Pdf and set a default appearance for the form fields.

insert-current-date-into-pdf-form-field.title: Insert Current Date into PDF Form Field
insert-current-date-into-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates creating a DateField on a PDF page, setting its display format, assigning the current system date, and saving the updated document.

create-multi-select-listbox.title: Create Multi‑Select ListBox in PDF
create-multi-select-listbox.description: Shows how to add a ListBox form field with multi‑selection enabled, populate its options, and pre‑select multiple items using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-pdf-combo-box-from-database.title: Populate PDF Combo Box from Database Data
populate-pdf-combo-box-from-database.description: Shows how to create a combo box form field in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, fill its options from a data source (simulated DataTable), optionally select a default item, and save the updated document.

add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Signature Field to PDF Form
add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a digital signature field into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the updated file.

extract-signature-appearance-image.title: Extract Signature Field Appearance as Image
extract-signature-appearance-image.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate signature fields, and extract their visual appearance as JPEG images for inclusion in audit logs.

set-max-length-for-pdf-textbox-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Text Box Field
set-max-length-for-pdf-textbox-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a text box form field, set its MaxLen property to restrict user input, and save the updated document.

enable-spell-checking-for-pdf-text-field.title: Enable Spell Checking for a PDF Text Field
enable-spell-checking-for-pdf-text-field.description: Shows how to add a text box form field to a PDF document and enable spell checking using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml__v2.description: Loads a PDF document, optionally sets a form field value, and saves the form data along with the document model to an XML file for offline collection.

validate-xml-xsd-import-pdf-form.title: Validate XML Against XSD and Import into PDF Form (XFA)
validate-xml-xsd-import-pdf-form.description: The example validates an incoming XML file against an XSD schema and, if valid, imports the XML data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf, then saves the filled PDF.

populate-pdf-form-from-xml-xslt.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML via XSLT
populate-pdf-form-from-xml-xslt.description: Demonstrates how to transform XML data with an XSLT stylesheet into XFDF and import the resulting field values into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-acroform-calc-total.title: Create PDF with AcroForm fields and auto‑calculating total
create-pdf-with-acroform-calc-total.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, add text box AcroForm fields, and attach JavaScript that automatically computes the total from quantity and price values.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts each form field's name and value, and writes the data to a UTF‑8 CSV file for external analysis.

add-hidden-session-id-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden Session ID Field to PDF
add-hidden-session-id-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a hidden text box form field into an existing PDF to store a session identifier for backend tracking.

set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.title: Set Default Appearance for PDF Form Fields
set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.description: Demonstrates how to define a default font, size, and color for all form fields in a PDF by assigning a DefaultAppearance to the document's Form.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf-stream.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF Stream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf-stream.description: Demonstrates exporting all form annotations and field values from a PDF directly to an XFDF XML stream, suitable for immediate HTTP response download.

import-xfdf-form-data-from-network-strea.title: Import XFDF Form Data from a Network Stream into a PDF
import-xfdf-form-data-from-network-strea.description: Shows how to download XFDF (XML) form data via HTTP and import the field values into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's XfdfReader.

bulk-fill-pdf-form-from-json-skip-missin.title: Bulk Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON with Missing Field Skipping
bulk-fill-pdf-form-from-json-skip-missin.description: Demonstrates how to import values from a JSON file into all form fields of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, while gracefully skipping fields that are not present in the JSON data.

read-xmp-pdfa-field-with-default.title: Read XMP PDF/A Extension Field with Default Fallback
read-xmp-pdfa-field-with-default.description: Shows how to extract a PDF/A extension field from an XML metadata file and return a predefined default value when the field is absent.

create-pdf-acroform-custom-tab-order.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Custom Tab Order
create-pdf-acroform-custom-tab-order.description: The example demonstrates how to create a PDF, add AcroForm text box fields, enable manual tab ordering, and define a custom tab order to improve keyboard navigation.

set-dashed-border-on-pdf-form-field.title: Set Dashed Border on PDF Form Field
set-dashed-border-on-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a specific form field, and apply a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf before saving the document.

set-beveled-border-style-for-pdf-form-fi.title: Set Beveled Border Style for PDF Form Field
set-beveled-border-style-for-pdf-form-fi.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve a form field widget annotation in a PDF and apply a beveled border style with a specified width and color using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.title: Set Background Image for PDF Form Field
apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image as the background of a PDF form field (handling both XFA and AcroForm fields) using Aspose.Pdf and then save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Indented JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configuring ExportFieldsToJsonOptions to enable indentation, and exporting all form fields to a formatted JSON file.

import-form-data-from-json.title: Import Form Data from JSON via REST API
import-form-data-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, retrieve JSON data from a REST API, populate the form fields using Document.Form.ImportFromJson, and save the populated PDF.

create-rtl-pdf-form-textbox.title: Create PDF Form with Right-to-Left TextBox
create-rtl-pdf-form-textbox.description: Demonstrates how to add a text box field to a PDF form that supports right‑to‑left languages by setting the default appearance and right horizontal alignment.

center-align-textbox-form-field.title: Center Align TextBox Form Field in PDF
center-align-textbox-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a TextBoxField by name, set its horizontal alignment to center, and save the updated document.

create-right-aligned-number-field.title: Create Right-Aligned Number Field in PDF
create-right-aligned-number-field.description: Shows how to add a numeric form field to a PDF and set its text alignment to right using Aspose.Pdf.

add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.title: Add Date Picker Field to PDF
add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a DateField on a PDF page, set its display format, and attach a JavaScript action that opens the built‑in calendar picker using Aspose.Pdf.

add-formatted-currency-field-to-pdf.title: Add Formatted Currency Field to PDF
add-formatted-currency-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with an interactive number field formatted as currency, including the symbol and thousand separators, using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-email-field-in-pdf-form.title: Add Email Validation to PDF Form
validate-email-field-in-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript validation action to a PDF form's email textbox, ensuring the value contains an "@" before it can be saved.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove a Form Field from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a form field by its name, and delete it using the Aspose.Pdf Form API.

insert-form-field-at-specific-index.title: Insert Form Field at Specific Index in PDF
insert-form-field-at-specific-index.description: Demonstrates creating a TextBoxField and inserting it into the Document.Form collection at a given zero‑based index, with a fallback to adding at the end if the index is out of range.

acroform-textfield-open-javascript.title: Create AcroForm Text Field with Document Open JavaScript
acroform-textfield-open-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, add an AcroForm text box field, and assign a document‑level JavaScript action that runs when the PDF is opened.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json-gzip.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and GZip Compress
export-pdf-form-data-to-json-gzip.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, exporting its form fields to JSON, and writing the JSON directly into a GZip stream for compact storage or transmission.

import-encrypted-xfa-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import Encrypted XFA Form Data into PDF
import-encrypted-xfa-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates decrypting an AES‑encrypted XML file containing XFA form data and assigning it to an interactive PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rich-text-box-field-with-html.title: Add Rich Text Box Field with HTML Formatting to PDF
add-rich-text-box-field-with-html.description: Demonstrates how to insert a RichTextBoxField into a PDF and set its formatted value using HTML markup.

create-pdf-with-acroform-tooltips.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Tooltips
create-pdf-with-acroform-tooltips.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, add a text box and a checkbox AcroForm field, assign tooltips via the AlternateName property, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-data-from-json__v2.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, bulk‑import form field values from a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated PDF.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML with Custom Root Element
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.description: Demonstrates how to export form field data from a PDF to an XML file and rename the root element to a custom name required by an external system.

add-calculated-total-field-javascript.title: Add Calculated Total Field Using JavaScript
add-calculated-total-field-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to create numeric form fields in a PDF and use a JavaScript action to calculate a running total of those fields.

set-date-field-default-to-current-time.title: Set Date Field Default to Current Time in PDF
set-date-field-default-to-current-time.description: Demonstrates how to add a DateField to a PDF, format it as HH:mm:ss, and set its default value to the current system time when the document is loaded.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document, add a barcode field to a form, set its properties, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dynamic-barcode-field-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Barcode Field to PDF
add-dynamic-barcode-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a barcode form field with a runtime‑generated value and insert it into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields and Export to JSON
validate-required-pdf-form-fields.description: The example loads a PDF, checks that all fields marked as required contain a value, and exports the form data to a JSON file only if validation passes.

verify-pdf-form-field-count.title: Verify PDF Form Field Count and Update a Field
verify-pdf-form-field-count.description: Demonstrates how to use Document.Form.Count to ensure a PDF contains the expected number of form fields, then updates a specific field and saves the document.

create-pdf-with-acroform-fields-and-marg.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Page Margins
create-pdf-with-acroform-fields-and-marg.description: Shows how to set page margins in an Aspose.Pdf document and add AcroForm text box and button fields before saving the PDF.

set-pdf-form-textbox-value.title: Set TextBox Value in PDF Form with Aspose.Pdf
set-pdf-form-textbox-value.description: The example loads a PDF, checks for an AcroForm, updates the "Name" text box field, and saves the modified document.

set-field-character-limit.title: Set Maximum Characters for PDF Form Field
set-field-character-limit.description: Demonstrates how to limit the number of characters a user can enter in a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor. The example loads a PDF, applies a 50‑character limit to the "CustomerName" field, and saves the result.

get-character-limit-of-textbox-form-fiel.title: Get Character Limit of a TextBox Form Field
get-character-limit-of-textbox-form-fiel.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field named "Address", and read its maximum character length using Aspose.Pdf.

add-checkbox-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Checkbox Field to PDF Form
add-checkbox-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a CheckboxField named 'AgreeTerms', add it to the document's form, and save the updated PDF.

delete-form-field-from-pdf.title: Delete a Form Field from a PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete the form field named "OldPhoneNumber", and save the modified document.

remove-typewriter-form-fields-page-3.title: Remove Typewriter Form Fields on Page 3 Using TextFragmentAbsorber
remove-typewriter-form-fields-page-3.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete Typewriter (TextBoxField) form fields on a specific PDF page (page 3) by using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and form manipulation APIs.

delete-form-fields-on-page.title: Delete Form Fields on a Specific PDF Page
delete-form-fields-on-page.description: Loads a PDF, identifies all form fields that belong to page 5, removes them from the form, and saves the cleaned document.

export-acroform-data-to-xml.title: Export AcroForm Data to XML
export-acroform-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its AcroForm fields, and write each field name and value to an XML file.

import-acroform-data-from-xfdf.title: Import AcroForm Data from XFDF into PDF
import-acroform-data-from-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing an AcroForm, read field values from an XFDF (XML) file, and save the updated PDF with the imported data.

add-submit-button-with-url-action.title: Add Submit Button with URL Action to PDF
add-submit-button-with-url-action.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically add a push‑button to a PDF and configure its OnActivated action to submit the form to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-textboxfield-maxlen-truncation.title: Validate MaxLen Truncation for PDF TextBoxField
validate-textboxfield-maxlen-truncation.description: Demonstrates setting a maximum character length on a PDF form TextBoxField with Aspose.Pdf and verifies that input exceeding the limit is automatically truncated.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Form Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, loop through every form field, set a custom font via the DefaultAppearance property, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Field Metadata to CSV
export-pdf-form-field-metadata-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate its form fields, retrieve each field's name, type, and default value, and write the data to a CSV file for auditing.

import-form-fields-from-csv.title: Import Form Fields from CSV into PDF
import-form-fields-from-csv.description: Reads a CSV file containing field metadata and creates corresponding form fields on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting properties like required and read‑only.

add-date-picker-field-default-current-da.title: Add Date Picker Field with Default Current Date
add-date-picker-field-default-current-da.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF form with a date picker field using Aspose.Pdf, set its default value to the current system date, and specify a display format.

date-picker-min-date-validation.title: Create Date Picker with Minimum Date Validation in PDF
date-picker-min-date-validation.description: Shows how to add a DateField to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and attach JavaScript that blocks dates earlier than January 1, 2000.

create-dynamic-list-box-pdf-form.title: Create Dynamic List Box in PDF Form
create-dynamic-list-box-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a ListBox field to a PDF form, configure its appearance, programmatically add options to simulate dynamic expansion, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-textbox-background-color-lightgray.title: Set Text Box Background Color to Light Gray
set-textbox-background-color-lightgray.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBoxField in its form, change the field's background fill color to light gray, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate and Rename PDF Form Field
duplicate-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically duplicate an existing PDF form field, assign new names to each copy, optionally reposition them, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.title: Add JavaScript Email Validation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate an existing "Email" form field, attach JavaScript that validates the presence of the '@' character, and save the updated document.

create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.title: Create PDF Tax Calculation Form with JavaScript
create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form with subtotal and tax‑rate fields and a read‑only tax amount that is calculated automatically using JavaScript.

export-calculated-tax-to-xml.title: Export Calculated Tax from PDF Form to XML
export-calculated-tax-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, reads the Amount field, calculates a 10% tax, writes it back to the Tax field, and exports the form data to an XML file for downstream processing.

import-tax-rate-xml-hidden-pdf-field.title: Import Tax Rate from XML into Hidden PDF Form Field
import-tax-rate-xml-hidden-pdf-field.description: Shows how to read a tax rate from an XML file and populate (or create) a hidden text box form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-noexport-flag-for-sensitive-pdf-form.title: Set NoExport Flag for Sensitive PDF Form Fields
set-noexport-flag-for-sensitive-pdf-form.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF form fields with Aspose.Pdf and mark fields containing sensitive data as non‑exportable (NoExport) so they are omitted from exported data.

pdf-form-language-dropdown.title: Create PDF Form with Language‑Dependent Labels
pdf-form-language-dropdown.description: Demonstrates building a PDF form that includes a language selection combo box and uses JavaScript to change label field texts dynamically based on the selected language.

batch-apply-custom-font-to-pdfs.title: Batch Apply Custom Font to PDF Text
batch-apply-custom-font-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to load a TrueType font, embed it, and apply it to every text fragment in multiple PDF files located on a network share.

set-required-pdf-form-field.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required and Validate
set-required-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating a form field, marking it as required (which shows a red border when empty), clearing its value, saving the document, and running PDF/A‑1B validation.

batch-set-comments-field-limit.title: Batch Set 100‑Character Limit on PDF Form Comments
batch-set-comments-field-limit.description: Loads each PDF in a folder, binds it to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor, sets a maximum of 100 characters for the form field named "Comments", and saves the modified files to an output directory.

pdf-form-field-report.title: Generate PDF Form Field Report with Character Limits
pdf-form-field-report.description: Loads one or more PDF files, iterates through their form fields, and prints each field's name, type, and character limit for text‑based fields.

update-pdf-form-fields.title: Update PDF Form Fields with Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF, setting text and checkbox values in its form fields, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Data to XFDF on Network Share
export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing AcroForm fields and export the form data as XFDF (XML) to a UNC network share using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xml-form-data-into-multiple-pdfs.title: Import XML Form Data into Multiple PDFs
import-xml-form-data-into-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to bind XML form data to several PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf and save the updated files.

flatten-first-page-remove-form-fields.title: Flatten First PDF Page to Remove Form Fields
flatten-first-page-remove-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten the first page to delete all form fields, and save the cleaned page as a template.

add-paymentmethod-radio-button-group.title: Add PaymentMethod Radio Button Group to PDF
add-paymentmethod-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF form with a radio button group named 'PaymentMethod' containing 'Credit' and 'Debit' options using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-selected-radio-button-value.title: Set Default Selected Radio Button Value in PDF Form
set-default-selected-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to create a radio button field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf and programmatically set its default selected option to "Credit".

add-multiline-feedback-text-field.title: Add Multiline Feedback Text Field to PDF
add-multiline-feedback-text-field.description: Shows how to insert a multiline TextBoxField named 'Feedback' with a 500‑character limit into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-signature-form-fields.title: Remove Signature Form Fields from PDF
remove-signature-form-fields.description: Shows how to loop through a PDF's form collection, identify fields of type SignatureField, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read all form fields, and write each field's name and current value to a CSV file for external processing.

import-csv-data-into-pdf-form-fields.title: Import CSV Data into PDF Form Fields
import-csv-data-into-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a CSV file and populating matching fields in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hidden-creation-timestamp-field.title: Add Hidden Creation Timestamp Field to PDF
add-hidden-creation-timestamp-field.description: Demonstrates how to insert a hidden, read‑only DateField into a PDF to store the document creation timestamp for audit purposes.

set-employeeid-field-readonly.title: Set EmployeeID Form Field to Read‑Only in PDF
set-employeeid-field-readonly.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a form field named "EmployeeID", and make it read‑only so users cannot modify its value, then save the updated document.

flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
flatten-pdf-form-fields__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten all interactive form fields so they become static page content, and save the resulting PDF.

copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.title: Copy Form Fields Between PDFs with Aspose.Pdf
copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.description: Shows how to copy all form fields from a source PDF into another PDF by cloning fields and adding them to the destination document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-country-dropdown-list.title: Create Country Dropdown List in PDF
create-country-dropdown-list.description: Demonstrates how to add a ComboBox (dropdown) form field to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and populate it with a predefined list of country names.

set-default-selected-item-in-pdf-dropdow.title: Set Default Selected Item in PDF Form Dropdown
set-default-selected-item-in-pdf-dropdow.description: Loads a PDF, finds the 'Country' form field, and sets its default selected value to 'United States' for ComboBox or ListBox fields using Aspose.Pdf Forms API.

validate-age-field-numeric-input.title: Validate Age NumberField Rejects Alphabetic Input
validate-age-field-numeric-input.description: Demonstrates how to create a NumberField for an Age entry, allow only numeric characters, and verify that alphabetic input is rejected with an InvalidValueFormatException.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF Form Fields
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.description: Shows how to flatten a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to strip all form fields and any attached JavaScript, enhancing document security before distribution.

export-form-field-appearance-streams.title: Export Form Field Appearance Streams to Separate PDFs
export-form-field-appearance-streams.description: Shows how to extract each form field's appearance stream from a PDF and save it as an individual PDF file for visual inspection.

assign-image-to-pdf-button-field.title: Assign Image to PDF Button Field
assign-image-to-pdf-button-field.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating a button form field, and setting a custom appearance stream using an external image file, then saving the branded PDF.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml.title: Batch Convert PDFs to XML Form Data
batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files and save each one as an XML form data file, preserving the original file name, using Aspose.Pdf.

synchronize-pdf-form-data-xfdf.title: Synchronize PDF Form Data via XFDF Export/Import
synchronize-pdf-form-data-xfdf.description: Exports filled form fields from a source PDF to an XFDF (XML) file and imports them into a target PDF, resulting in a synchronized, filled document.

create-pdf-with-xfa-form-and-flatten.title: Create PDF with XFA Form Field and Flatten
create-pdf-with-xfa-form-and-flatten.description: Shows how to add an AcroForm text box, bind XFA data, and flatten the form to static content using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-xfa-with-acroform-from-xml.title: Replace XFA Form with AcroForm Using XML Template
replace-xfa-with-acroform-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to convert an XFA‑based PDF to a standard AcroForm by loading field definitions from an XML template and programmatically adding the corresponding form fields.

set-tooltip-for-email-form-field.title: Set Tooltip for Email Form Field in PDF
set-tooltip-for-email-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the 'Email' form field, assign a tooltip (alternate name) that describes the required input format, and save the modified document.

highlight-mandatory-text-field-red-borde.title: Highlight Mandatory Text Field with Red Border
highlight-mandatory-text-field-red-borde.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBox form field, set its border color to red to flag mandatory data, and save the modified document.

add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.title: Add Signature Field with Image Stamp to PDF
add-signature-field-with-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature form field named 'ClientSignature' and set its visual appearance using an image stamp, then save the updated PDF.

sign-and-lock-pdf-signature-field.title: Sign and Lock a PDF Signature Field
sign-and-lock-pdf-signature-field.description: Demonstrates how to sign the 'ClientSignature' field in a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate and then lock the field to prevent further edits during review.

create-hidden-calculation-field.title: Create Hidden Calculation Field with JavaScript
create-hidden-calculation-field.description: Shows how to add a hidden, read‑only textbox to a PDF form and attach a JavaScript OnCalculate action that sums the values of two other fields.

export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export Selected PDF Form Fields to XML
export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, filter specific form fields by name, and export their values into a custom XML document.

update-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Update PDF Form Fields from XML Subset
update-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file containing a subset of field values and update the matching form fields in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-date-field-format-pdf.title: Validate Date Field Format in PDF with JavaScript
validate-date-field-format-pdf.description: Shows how to add a DateField to a PDF document and attach a JavaScript action that validates the entered value against the MM/DD/YYYY regular expression.

set-max-length-for-pdf-password-fields.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Password Fields
set-max-length-for-pdf-password-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over its form fields, and enforce a 20‑character limit on password fields using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-template-from-json.title: Create PDF Form Template and Populate from JSON
create-pdf-form-template-from-json.description: Shows how to programmatically build a PDF form with placeholder fields using Aspose.Pdf, generate a sample JSON data file, and fill the form by importing the JSON values.

batch-fill-pdf-templates-from-csv.title: Batch Fill PDF Templates from CSV Data
batch-fill-pdf-templates-from-csv.description: Shows how to read rows from a CSV file into a DataTable, create a table for each row, insert it into a PDF template, and save individual filled PDFs.

import-xfa-form-data-from-xml.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML with Error Handling
import-xfa-form-data-from-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing an XFA form, import XML data into the form, and gracefully handle missing or malformed XML files.

set-form-field-visibility-based-on-anoth.title: Set Form Field Visibility Based on Another Field
set-form-field-visibility-based-on-anoth.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a PDF form field with Aspose.Pdf so that the visibility of a target field is toggled depending on the source field's value.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.description: Shows how to load a PDF, retrieve its form definition and export the fields to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a JSON schema that defines AcroForm fields, import those fields into a new PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, and save the resulting form PDF.

set-checkbox-default-checked.title: Set Checkbox Default State to Checked in PDF
set-checkbox-default-checked.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a checkbox form field, sets its default state to checked, and saves the file.

create-pdf-form-with-submit-button.title: Create PDF Form with Submit Button to REST Endpoint
create-pdf-form-with-submit-button.description: Shows how to generate a PDF form containing a text box and a submit button that automatically posts the form data to a REST API when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-submit-button-http-post-urlencoded.title: Add Submit Button with HTTP POST and URL‑Encoded Form Data
add-submit-button-http-post-urlencoded.description: Demonstrates how to place a push‑button on a PDF that submits the form via HTTP POST using application/x-www-form-urlencoded format with Aspose.Pdf.

unit-test-submit-form-action-returns-200.title: Unit Test SubmitFormAction Returns 200 OK
unit-test-submit-form-action-returns-200.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a submit button using Aspose.Pdf and verify the form submission by mocking an HTTP POST request that returns a 200 OK status.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to insert a button field into an existing PDF that clears all user‑entered data by executing JavaScript when clicked.

set-radio-button-export-values.title: Set Radio Button Export Values in PDF
set-radio-button-export-values.description: Shows how to create a radio button form field with custom export codes for each option using Aspose.Pdf, set a default selection, and save the updated PDF.

create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-form-field.title: Create PDF with Hidden GUID Form Field
create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-form-field.description: Shows how to generate a GUID at runtime and store it in a hidden TextBox form field inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

transfer-transform-pdf-form-data.title: Transfer and Transform PDF Form Data Using JSON
transfer-transform-pdf-form-data.description: Shows how to export form fields from a PDF to JSON, modify the data (rename fields and change values), and import the transformed data into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-viewer-zoom-fitwindow.title: Set PDF Viewer Zoom Using FitWindow
set-pdf-viewer-zoom-fitwindow.description: Opens an existing PDF, enables the FitWindow viewer preference to make the document automatically zoom to fit the window, and saves the updated file.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Submit Button
add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.description: Shows how to create a push‑button in a PDF, assign a tooltip (using AlternateName as a fallback) and attach a submit‑form action with Aspose.Pdf.

lock-pdf-form-fields.title: Lock PDF Form Fields (Read‑Only)
lock-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to set every form field in a PDF to read‑only and optionally flatten the form using Aspose.Pdf, then save the locked document.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field__v2.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field__v2.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document containing a form field that displays a Code128 barcode based on a numeric identifier.

set-file-select-field-size-limit-2mb.title: Set File‑Select Field Size Limit to 2 MB
set-file-select-field-size-limit-2mb.description: Shows how to enforce a 2 MB maximum upload size for a file‑select field in a PDF form by using Aspose.Pdf's FileSizeLimitToMemoryLoading property and adding a TextBoxField to the document.

create-pdf-form-with-qr-code.title: Create PDF Form with QR Code Field
create-pdf-form-with-qr-code.description: Shows how to build a PDF form that contains a user‑editable text box and a QR code field that reflects the entered data using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.title: Auto‑Update QR Code from Text Field in PDF
auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to create a text box and a QR code barcode field in a PDF and use JavaScript to automatically update the QR code whenever the text field value changes.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-and-transfor.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Transform to Custom Report
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-and-transfor.description: Loads a PDF with a form, exports the form fields to XML using Aspose.Pdf, then applies an XSLT stylesheet to produce a custom HTML report.

import-xml-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form (XFA)
import-xml-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, read transformed XML, assign it to the XFA form fields, and save the populated PDF.

create-pdf-multi-select-list-box.title: Create PDF with Multi‑Select List Box
create-pdf-multi-select-list-box.description: Demonstrates how to add a list box form field to a PDF that allows multiple selections using Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-select-listbox-max-three.title: Create Multi‑Select List Box with Maximum Three Selections
create-multi-select-listbox-max-three.description: Shows how to add a list box form field to a PDF, enable multi‑selection, and restrict the user to selecting up to three items using Aspose.Pdf for C#.

add-hidden-ip-address-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden IP Address Field to PDF
add-hidden-ip-address-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a hidden text box field in a PDF and fill it with the user's IP address using document‑level JavaScript.

validate-ipv4-address-in-pdf-form.title: Validate IPv4 Address in PDF Form Field
validate-ipv4-address-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, retrieve a text box form field, validate its value with an IPv4 regular expression, highlight invalid entries, and save the document.

create-pdf-form-digital-signature.title: Create PDF Form with Digital Signature and Certificate Validation
create-pdf-form-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF form, sign it using a PKCS#7 certificate, verify the signature, and save the signed document.

require-signature-and-lock-pdf.title: Require Signature Field and Lock PDF After Signing
require-signature-and-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a required digital signature field to a PDF, signing it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and locking the document to prevent further modifications.

export-pdf-signature-info-to-xml.title: Export PDF Signature Information to XML
export-pdf-signature-info-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export its digital signature data to an XML file for audit logging.

import-xfdf-signature-and-sign-pdf.title: Import XFDF Signature Data and Sign PDF Field
import-xfdf-signature-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to import digital signature information from an XFDF (XML) file into a PDF, locate the corresponding signature field, apply a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, and save the signed document.

set-pdf-form-field-password.title: Set Password Field Value and Make Read‑Only in PDF
set-pdf-form-field-password.description: Loads a PDF, locates a password box form field, assigns a password value, marks the field read‑only, and saves the updated document.

validate-pdf-form-field-password-protect.title: Validate Password Protection on PDF Form Field
validate-pdf-form-field-password-protect.description: The example creates an encrypted PDF containing a text box form field, then shows that opening the document with an incorrect password throws an InvalidPasswordException, while the correct password allows reading the field value.

create-pdf-form-automatic-backup.title: Create PDF Form with Automatic Backup on Field Change
create-pdf-form-automatic-backup.description: Shows how to build a PDF form, add a text box field, and attach a JavaScript action that saves a backup copy each time the field value is modified.

add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.title: Add JavaScript Listener to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field that runs when the field's value changes, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v4.title: Export PDF Form Field Appearance Settings to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v4.description: Shows how to load a PDF, configure export options, and write all form fields—including their appearance settings—to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-appearances-from-json.title: Import Form Field Appearances from JSON into PDF
import-form-appearances-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import form field appearance settings from a JSON file, and save the updated document.

create-collapsible-section-pdf-form.title: Create Collapsible Section in PDF Form with Checkbox
create-collapsible-section-pdf-form.description: Shows how to add a checkbox that toggles the visibility of a multiline text box using JavaScript, creating a collapsible section in an Aspose.Pdf form.

collapse-pdf-outline.title: Collapse PDF Outline (Bookmark) Using Aspose.Pdf
collapse-pdf-outline.description: Shows how to set the initial state of a PDF outline (bookmark) to collapsed by setting the Open property of the first OutlineItem and saving the document.

create-pdf-form-calculated-total-price.title: Create PDF Form with Calculated Total Price
create-pdf-form-calculated-total-price.description: Demonstrates how to add numeric form fields to a PDF and use JavaScript to automatically calculate and display a total price based on quantity and unit price.

extract-total-price-from-pdf-to-xml.title: Extract Total Price from PDF and Export to XML
extract-total-price-from-pdf-to-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting monetary values using TextAbsorber, calculating the total, and writing the result to an XML file for external invoicing.

generate-pdf-price-report-with-xml-disco.title: Generate PDF Price Report with XML Discount Rates
generate-pdf-price-report-with-xml-disco.description: The example reads discount rates from an XML file, applies them sequentially to a base price, and writes the calculation result into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-pdf-only-attachment.title: Create PDF Form with PDF‑Only File Attachment Field
create-pdf-form-pdf-only-attachment.description: Shows how to add a text box that only accepts PDF file names and a button that embeds the selected PDF into the document using JavaScript validation.

validate-file-size-pdf-form.title: Validate File Size for PDF FileSelectBoxField
validate-file-size-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF form, read a FileSelectBoxField, check the selected file's size against a 5 MB limit, and add a warning annotation if the limit is exceeded.

add-progress-bar-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Progress Bar Field to PDF Form
add-progress-bar-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a read‑only TextBoxField that serves as a visual progress bar in an existing PDF form and optionally add a custom appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-progress-bar-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Progress Bar Value to XML
export-pdf-progress-bar-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, reads the value of a progress bar form field, and writes that value to an XML file for external tracking of form completion.

language-specific-pdf-form-dynamic-label.title: Language‑Specific PDF Form with Dynamic Label
language-specific-pdf-form-dynamic-label.description: Shows how to create a PDF form that changes a label's text based on the selected locale using a combo box and JavaScript actions.

locale-aware-pdf-with-javascript-transla.title: Create Locale-Aware PDF with JavaScript Translations
locale-aware-pdf-with-javascript-transla.description: Demonstrates embedding a JavaScript dictionary of translations in a PDF and updating a text box field based on the selected locale using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-fill-pdf-form-from-database.title: Batch Fill PDF Form from Database Using Aspose.Pdf
batch-fill-pdf-form-from-database.description: Shows how to load a PDF form template, populate its fields with data from a DataTable (simulating a database), and generate a separate filled PDF for each record using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-with-required-field-vali.title: Create PDF Form with Required Field Validation
create-pdf-form-with-required-field-vali.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form with required text fields and attach JavaScript to a submit button that checks the fields before submitting the form.

create-pdf-form-with-hidden-interaction-.title: Create PDF Form with Hidden Interaction Log
create-pdf-form-with-hidden-interaction-.description: Shows how to add a hidden text field to a PDF form and attach JavaScript OnExit actions to log each field interaction for analytics.

export-form-interaction-to-xfdf-xml.title: Export Form Interaction Log to XFDF and XML
export-form-interaction-to-xfdf-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, assign a submit button action, export filled form data to XFDF, and save the PDF document model as XML for server‑side analysis.

import-xfdf-interaction-log-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Interaction Log into PDF
import-xfdf-interaction-log-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import annotations from an XFDF (XML) interaction log using Aspose.Pdf, and save the reconstructed document.

add-current-date-time-field-to-pdf.title: Add Current Date and Time Field to PDF
add-current-date-time-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a DateField into a PDF form that automatically shows the current date and time, and saves the updated document.

create-read-only-date-field.title: Create Read‑Only Date Field in PDF
create-read-only-date-field.description: Shows how to add a DateField to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its initial value and display format, mark it as read‑only, and save the document.

conditional-pdf-form-section.title: Create Conditional PDF Form Section with Checkbox
conditional-pdf-form-section.description: Shows how to add a checkbox that toggles the visibility of a text field using JavaScript actions in an Aspose.Pdf document.

export-visibility-preferences-to-xml.title: Export Annotation Visibility Preferences to XML
export-visibility-preferences-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF, updates annotation properties based on user preferences (e.g., widget exportable flag), and saves the document model to an XML file to preserve those visibility settings across sessions.

apply-xml-annotation-visibility-to-pdf.title: Apply XML-defined Annotation Visibility to PDF
apply-xml-annotation-visibility-to-pdf.description: The example reads a visibility setting from an XML file and updates the visibility of all annotations in a PDF accordingly, using the Annotation.Flags property.

create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.title: Create PDF Form with Concatenated Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.description: Demonstrates building a PDF form with three text box fields, concatenating their values, and generating a read‑only Code128 barcode field from the combined string using Aspose.Pdf.

dynamic-code128-barcode-form.title: Create Dynamic Code128 Barcode Form Field
dynamic-code128-barcode-form.description: Shows how to add a text field and a Code128 barcode field to a PDF and use JavaScript to update the barcode automatically when the text field value changes.

export-barcode-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Barcode Fields to XML
export-barcode-fields-to-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating its form fields, extracting values from barcode fields, and writing those values to an XML file for integration with inventory systems.
